name: product_page_1_products_e-gift-code

observed_strengths.observation: Reviews confirmed on gift code PDP — H3 headings include 'Just What I Needed', 'Happy to Plant Trees but a few website errors', 'Mother's Day Best!', 'Fantastic company', 'SO EASY' — review infrastructure present and active; one review title mentions 'plant trees', confirming environmental mission resonates with buyers
'We Think You'll Like...' H2 — product recommendation section present on PDP, enabling cross-sell to related apparel items from the gift code page
'Every Item Plants 10 Trees' H2 — consistent mission reinforcement directly on the PDP, placing environmental impact at the moment of purchase decision

missing_or_weak.observation: Add-to-cart failed on this PDP during the shopping journey — gift codes may require email input or a value selection that the crawler's standard add-to-cart detection couldn't trigger; this is a gift-code-specific UX issue, not an apparel add-to-cart bug
OG title and description empty on this PDP — same sitewide OG tag gap; gift code social shares produce blank preview cards
No product H1 visible in heading structure — the product name 'E-Gift Code' appears in the page title but not in an H1; PDPs lack a visible heading hierarchy starting with the product name

purchase_path_notes: Gift code PDP has reviews and cross-sell. Add-to-cart failure is expected (gift code requires value selection) — the crawler correctly fell back to the next PDP. Review titles confirm mission resonance: gift buyers explicitly cite 'planting trees' as a purchase motivator.
